title.en: There was a sign in front of them - Yunmeng Mis...

content.en:
In the Mist Mercenary Guild, in a corner, three girls are recruiting temporary members.

There was a sign in front of them - Yunmeng Mist Mercenary Group!

Compared with other mercenary groups, the Yunmeng Mist Mercenary Group has no advantage at all, just because the strength of the three girls who came to recruit the members is not very good, two of them are only in the cosmic god realm, and the other girl is in the master realm, but she is only in the third order.

The strength of such a mercenary group is not very good.

Although the three girls are cute, but when they enter the misty area, they are joking with their lives, even if they are, they don't dare to rashly join a mercenary group with no strength, it is simply looking for death.

"Hey, we haven't recruited a temporary member of the group now, and after we go back, the head of the regiment will definitely be disappointed!"

The woman who dominated the third order said helplessly.

"There's no way, who made our Yunmeng Mist Mercenary Group so weak!"

The other two women said with sad faces.

Suddenly, a voice came.

"Do you want to recruit temporary members?"

The three women looked at each other and saw a kind-looking young man appear in front of them.

This young man is Ye Tian.

"Juggernaut the Extreme!"

The three women were taken aback, and they were immediately surprised by Ye Tian's cultivation.

You must know that although there were a few cultivators who came to inquire before, they were basically in the Universe God Realm, and the powerhouses who dominated the extreme would basically choose to join those large mist mercenary groups, and it was impossible for them to come to their small mercenary group.

"Recruit Recruit!!"

The three women hurriedly said.

"What conditions do you need for your Yunmeng Mist Mercenary Regiment to recruit temporary members?" Ye Tian asked.

"Cultivation above the cosmic god, it's okay to have low sin karma!"

The three women said.

The cosmic god is basically a necessary basic condition for cultivation, if there is no such cultivation, then enter the misty area, and there will be no life!

As for the low karma of sin, that is only required by a small number of misty mercenary groups, and most of the mercenary groups only look at strength.

But the Yunmeng Mercenary Group obviously didn't want to recruit a criminal person, otherwise it would bring a lot of trouble to the mercenary group.

But the strong people who can cultivate to the cosmic god or above, many people have been killed, and there are many people who have done some bad things, and there are indeed very few people with low negative karma.

Although Ye Tian also killed a lot, in general, the karma of sins is definitely not high, because he will not kill innocents indiscriminately except for killing foreign races, and the universe has its own specific criteria for judging evil.

If Ye Tian's evil karma is considered high, but all the strong people in the universe are heinous.

"Do you really want to join our Cloud Dream Mist Mercenary Regiment?"

The woman who dominated the Third Order asked.

"Yes!"

Ye Tian nodded.

"Then test your sinful karma!"

They took out a round ball, this ball contains a little source power, although it is not a source thing, but the value is not low, it is a treasure specially tested for sinful karma - sin beads!

Ye Tian stretched out his hand and tested it.

Soon, the Evil Orb released a faint white light.

"Evil karma is very low, welcome to join our Yunmeng Mist Mercenary Group!"

The three women rejoiced.

Subsequently, Ye Tian communicated with the three women and learned their titles.

The woman who dominated the third order was called the Mei Yuan Master, and the other two women's branches were called the Iron Blue Divine Lord and the Guanghua Divine Lord.

And Ye Tian naturally did not report his name as the Master of Ten Thousand Laws, but took a very ordinary title - the Master of the Law Heaven!

A day passed, and the Yunmeng Mist Mercenary Group only recruited Ye Tian, a master of the extreme.

"Let's go back first, and by the way, take the Fa Heavenly Juggernaut to meet our head sister!"

Plum Garden dominates the road.

Teleportation and flight were forbidden in the Ancient City of Tianya, so several people slowly walked in the Ancient City of Tianya.

On the road.

The master of Mei Yuan carefully introduced the Yunmeng Mist Mercenary Group to Ye Tian: "Fa Tian Juggernaut, although our Yunmeng Mist Mercenary Group is not very strong, it is a very ancient Mist Mercenary Group, as early as 30 million years ago, our Mercenary Group existed, and in its heyday, there was even a Supreme and three Heavenly Venerables!"

"Oh, 30 million years ago!"

Ye Tian was a little surprised, this was indeed a very ancient mist mercenary group.

However, he also knew that what the Master of Mei Yuan was talking about was the glorious history of the Yunmeng Mist Mercenary Group, and now it was definitely far worse than it was at the beginning.

"How much strength do our Meiyuan Mist Mercenary Group have now?"

Ye Tian asked.

At this time, the Mei Yuan Juggernaut said embarrassedly: "Now we only have four Juggernades, twelve Cosmic Gods! If you count the Fa Heavenly Juggernaut, that is the five Juggernaut!"

It's a pity that Ye Tian is only a temporary member, if he becomes a full member, the Yunmeng Mercenary Group can be regarded as having five masters.

But there are too few temporary members who are willing to become full members, and they are basically local cultivators of the Chaos Sea who are willing to become official members of the Mist Mercenary Group, and other outsiders are basically just temporary members.

However, there are very few local cultivators, and if there are not enough temporary members of outsiders to join, the strength of the Mist Mercenary Group is too weak, and it is too dangerous to enter the Mist area.

Otherwise, these Mist Mercenary Groups would not have vigorously recruited temporary members!

Soon, the headquarters of the Yunmeng Mist Mercenary Group in the Heavenly Crescent Ancient City arrived.

Entering the headquarters of the Yunmeng Mist Mercenary Group, Ye Tian met the leader of the Yunmeng Mist Mercenary Group, the Yunlan Master!

"Fatian Master, hello, I am the head of the Yunmeng Mist Mercenary Group, the Yunlan Master, the master of the Extreme Cultivation!"

Yun Lan dominated.

"Hello Yunlan Juggernaut, I am Fa Tian Juggernaut!

Ye Tian briefly introduced himself.

And Ye Chen's real name is fake, anyway, he just joined this mercenary group temporarily.

Both sides sat down.

Lord Yunlan asked, "Fatian Master, how much do you know about the Misty Region?"

"I don't know much!" Ye Tiandao: "I only know that once the misty area appears in ten thousand years, every time it appears for ten years, there are many misty beasts in it, and even the supreme entering the misty area will be in danger." "

"Not bad!"

Yunlan Juggernaut nodded: "The misty beasts in the misty area are very dangerous, and they are very fast, compared to the speed, we will definitely not be able to compare." Therefore, the most important thing to enter the fog area is to defend the formation. Some defensive formations are formed by cultivators together, and they can move with the cultivators, and the defensive formations that move freely are one of the ways to counter the misty beasts. Because of this, the Mist Mercenary Group needs a certain amount of manpower, otherwise it would be dangerous to enter the Mist area. Although our Yunmeng Mist Mercenary Group is not strong, it is very experienced, and with the experience codex of the previous leaders of the Yunmeng Mist Mercenary Group, as long as we don't go deep into the Mist area, the danger is not very great!"

Afterwards, Ye Tian and Yun Lan Juggernaut talked about some details about the misty area.

Gradually, Ye Tian learned more about the misty area.

For example, people divide the fog area into three areas: the outer area, the inner area, and the core area.

Among them, the outer area is dangerous for the master, but it will not fall, and the inner area will be dangerous, even if the Tianzun enters, there is a danger of falling, if it is the core area, the supreme will have to escape!

In addition, the mist area is easy to get lost, and the misty mercenary group needs to arrange small formations to identify the direction one by one before they can identify the direction, so as to withdraw safely from the fog area, otherwise once they lose their way, even the Supreme will be finished.

"Fa Tian Juggernaut, according to the time, there are about three years left, and the mist area will be born somewhere in the Chaos Sea, in these three years, please also ask the Fa Tian Juggernaut to live in the headquarters of the Yunmeng Mist Mercenary Group!"

Yun Lan dominated.

"Okay!"

Ye Tianying said.

Three years was not a long time, and he passed in a casual retreat.
